leagueMatchEvent.name: Art Battle for the Ages
leagueMatchEvent.desc: It's rollers vs. brushes for bragging rights!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
This Challenge only allows rollers and brushes—it's not for the faint of art!

・ The only weapons you can use are rollers or brushes!
・ Both primary and secondary abilities will be enabled!

leagueMatchEvent.name: Foggy Notion
leagueMatchEvent.desc: The stakes are high in low-vis battles!
leagueMatchEvent.regulation:
Can you use the fog cover to your advantage?

・ The stage will be shrouded in fog through the battle.
・ However, the density of the fog will change as the battle goes on!
・ Both primary and secondary abilities will be enabled!
